description: Initialize Go project structure: Create 'wt' directory with go.mod, main.go, and basic cmd/ and pkg/ folder structure. Use 'go mod init github.com/bmingles/wt' and add dependencies: cobra (CLI framework), bubbletea (TUI), lipgloss (styling), and go-git (git operations).
acceptance_criteria: go.mod exists with module name github.com/bmingles/wt
main.go exists with package main and basic entry point
